meu_pratinho.idade_desc: 6 months, with signs of readiness present.
meu_pratinho.consistencia_desc: No mixer, blender, strainer or mesh feeder. What you don't mash, offer in pieces to stimulate chewing and orofacial development.
meu_pratinho.colher_desc: Size suitable for the diameter of the child's mouth. Prefer silicone or plastic.
meu_pratinho.montar_desc: Follow the proportion in the image, giving preference to rich, fresh and varied foods.
meu_pratinho.como_montar_subtitulo: How to assemble a balanced plate for children
meu_pratinho.legumes_verduras_desc: Rich in vitamins, minerals, fiber, and non-heme iron. Focus on variety — the more colorful, the better! Beets, chayote, zucchini, carrots, lettuce, broccoli, cauliflower, spinach, chard, arugula, watercress. Should occupy half of the plate.
meu_pratinho.proteinas_desc: Source of protein, fat, iron, zinc, and vitamin B12. Includes meat, egg, fish, and chicken. Opt for lean meats and poultry. Choose 1 option per meal and vary throughout the week.
meu_pratinho.agua_desc: Always offer after each meal and snack. Hydrate constantly! Water is essential for the proper functioning of the body. Avoid sugary drinks, juices, and teas.
meu_pratinho.leguminosas_desc: Proteins, fiber, iron, zinc, and B vitamins. Beans, chickpeas, peas, lentils, soy. Choose 1 option per meal and vary plant protein throughout the week.
meu_pratinho.frutas_desc: Source of vitamins, minerals, fiber, and energy. Great for dessert and snacks. Avocado, pineapple, acerola, banana, persimmon, guava, kiwi, orange, apple, papaya, watermelon, strawberry, pear, grape, and more.
meu_pratinho.cereais_desc: Sources of vitamins, minerals, and energy. Rice, pasta, potatoes, cassava, yams. Vary throughout the week and prefer whole grains for more fiber and nutrients.
meu_pratinho.oleos_desc: Important for healthy baby development and absorption of fat-soluble vitamins. Use small amounts of olive oil or canola oil. Avoid saturated fats, trans fats, margarine, and fried foods.
meu_pratinho.leite_desc: Source of protein, fat, calcium, and vitamin A. Milk, curd, unsweetened natural yogurt, and cheeses. Great to include in breakfast and snacks. Prefer whole versions with no added sugar.
meu_pratinho.oleaginosas_desc: Sources of vitamins, fiber, healthy fats, and antioxidants. Almonds, peanuts, hazelnuts, cashew nuts, Brazil nuts, pecans, and pistachios. Great options for snacks.

orientacoes_rn.titulo:
THE FIRST DAYS
WITH MY BABY
orientacoes_rn.umbigo_text_pos: at every diaper change and after bathing.
orientacoes_rn.ictericia_text: Yellowish skin? Contact your pediatrician immediately.
orientacoes_rn.febre_text: Under 3 months: ER visit. Over 3 months: follow medical guidelines.
orientacoes_rn.higiene_text: 1 bath/day with mild soap. No baby powder or perfume. Clean with warm water & cotton.
orientacoes_rn.obs_1: Visit pediatrician between 7 and 14 days of life.
orientacoes_rn.obs_2: Go to health clinic for scheduled vaccines.
orientacoes_rn.obs_4: Newborn hearing screening as soon as possible.
orientacoes_rn.obs_5: Always place baby to sleep on their back.
orientacoes_rn.obs_6: No pillows or heavy blankets in the crib.
orientacoes_rn.obs_7: Dress baby in light, comfortable layers.
orientacoes_rn.obs_8: Introduce solids only after 6 months with guidance.

receita_alta.gotas_dor_febre: Give {gotas} drops every 6 hours if pain or fever
receita_alta.gotas_colica: Give {gotas} drops every 8 hours if colic
receita_alta.coto_umbilical: Apply to the umbilical stump at every diaper change
receita_alta.obstrucao_nasal: Apply 3 sprays in each nostril if nasal congestion

horarios.label: LUNCH
horarios.val: Cereal or root vegetable + animal protein + legume + vegetables + fruit

introducao.qty: Start with 2 to 3 tablespoons and increase amount based on acceptance
2/3 of a 250 ml cup or bowl
3/4 of a 250 ml cup or bowl

guia_alimentar.quote_text: "Nourishing is an act of love and patience."
guia_alimentar.quote_desc: Introducing solids is more than just offering food: it is the beginning of a healthy relationship with eating. Respect signs of fullness, encourage autonomy, and explore new textures with love.
guia_alimentar.quote_desc_pdf: Introducing solids is more than just offering food: it is the beginning of a healthy relationship with eating. Respect signs of fullness, encourage autonomy, and explore new textures with love.

help.busca_desc: Type your technical question below for instant guidance about the platform.
help.busca_placeholder: Ex: How to print? How to export as PNG?
help.busca_fallback_texto: Sorry, I couldn't find an exact answer for your question. Try searching for words like 'printing', 'export', 'colors', 'stationery' or check the frequently asked questions below!
help.concierge_titulo: Want to go beyond the guided experience?
help.concierge_desc: We also offer custom adjustments, manual refinements, and exclusive creative direction for brands looking for closer support.
help.sugestoes_desc: Did you miss a specific stationery item? Have ideas to improve the platform? Send us a message! We read all suggestions to make The Brand Box even better.

kb.impressao: To print your stationery with maximum quality, we recommend using the High-Resolution Vector PDF files available in the 'Stationery' tab. If you're using a professional printer, select the option 'Submit my final artwork'. If printing at home, use high-weight coated or offset paper (minimum 180g). Remember: complex folds and special formats require a professional printing service!
kb.exportacao: You can export your Logo and Seal in PNG format with a transparent background (perfect for Instagram posts, watermarks, or signatures) or with a colored background directly in the 'Logo' tab. The stationery and guides are exported in standard printing PDF, with high-definition colors and ready to print!
kb.cores: Your palette colors are carefully generated based on your brand's essence. In the 'Colors' tab, you can change the priority order of the colors (by dragging and dropping the blocks) to highlight which color should be more dominant in your artwork, signatures, and promotional materials!
kb.tamanhos: The templates generated in the 'Stationery' tab follow official market formats. However, to adjust the logo scale (since different fonts have distinct widths and behaviors on the pieces), we provide a 'Logo Scale' slider in the 'Stationery' tab. This adjustment helps you perfectly balance the logo in the reserved space, and yes, the generated PDF updates in real-time with the chosen size!
kb.uso da marca: Your Brand Guide (available for download in the 'Guide' tab) precisely describes the golden rules for the correct use of your new visual identity: how to combine fonts, which color palette to use on light and dark backgrounds, and the correct application of the logo and seal on different surfaces!
kb.papelaria: The 'Stationery' tab is your complete production hub! It generates perfect templates for bags, discharge summaries, thank you cards, bag tags, shipping labels, and growth charts. All files are dynamically generated in ultra-high-definition vector PDF!
kb.limites do sistema: To ensure technical balance and stability of your Brand Box, pattern generations have a standard limit of 3 attempts in the gallery. In addition, brand name changes are limited to 1 change per license, which prevents abuse and ensures the consistency of your new visual identity!

items.q: Can I change my colors?
items.a: Colors are generated based on your diagnosis. In the 'Colors' tab, you can rearrange the priority of the colors (dragging and dropping blocks) to highlight your favorite colors in the design.

items.q: How many patterns can I generate?
items.a: Each project allows up to 3 new pattern generations in your gallery to ensure you have exclusive and perfect options.

items.q: Can I move my logo?
items.a: To maintain visual balance and identity consistency, element positions follow a fixed professional structure, but you can choose between different layouts in the 'Logo' tab.

items.q: How can I make my logo more balanced?
items.a: Use the 'Logo Height' control to adjust the spacing between the brand and the tagline, and select horizontal, vertical, or stacked layouts that best match your name!

items.q: How do I choose the best size?
items.a: The PDF templates generated in the 'Stationery' tab are already perfectly sized in standard market formats (they are official ready-to-use templates). However, to adjust the logo scale on the pieces, we provide a 'Logo Scale' slider in the 'Stationery' tab. This adjustment helps you perfectly balance the logo, and the generated PDF is updated in real-time!

items.q: Can I have more font options?
items.a: Our intelligent algorithm has selected an exclusive group of 6 premium fonts that have perfect affinity with the essence and style identified for your brand. To maintain the coherence and harmony of your visual identity, the selection is limited to these 6 curated options per project.

items.q: Can I upload my own logo?
items.a: Yes! If you already have a logo image or your own symbol, you can upload it directly at the top of the 'Logo' tab. The system will apply your custom logo to all printed materials, digital cards, and posts automatically.

items.q: Can I print at home?
items.a: You can print common flat items in A4 format (such as prescriptions, order sheets, or letterheads) directly on your home printer. However, items with folds or more complex formats (such as bags, pouches, giant tissue paper, or special format tags) require finishes that home printers cannot handle. For these, the absolute recommendation is to send them to a professional printing shop.

items.q: What should I do when printing at home?
items.a: Crucial setting: always set your printer to 'Actual Size / 100% Scale'. Never select 'Fit to page' or 'Shrink to fit', as this will misalign the templates and crop marks! And remember to set the print quality to 'High' on the appropriate paper to remove imperfections and ensure color fidelity.

items.q: How to send to a print shop?
items.a: Download the high-resolution PDF from the 'Stationery' tab and send it directly to your preferred print shop. The files are already closed in the professional printing standard. Important tip: the on-screen preview is just an approximate visual simulation. The downloaded PDF file is the official 100% accurate high-definition document for printing. Always open and review the downloaded PDF file on your computer before sending it to the print shop to ensure everything is perfect!

items.q: Which format should I use?
items.a: For digital viewing and social media, export in PNG (transparent background). For professional printing of bags and printed materials, always use the PDF available in the corresponding tab.

items.q: How do I know which paper to use for printing?
items.a: You can consult your preferred print shop or check the recommended details directly on the platform! By clicking the button to download the PDF of any item in the 'Stationery' tab, the system displays a complete technical sheet with the exact size of the piece, the recommended paper weight and type, and even the estimated average cost of producing this item in the market.

items.q: How to avoid cuts in the pattern?
items.a: If the repetition of your pattern shows visible marks on the edges or hard cuts, go to the 'Pattern' tab and click the magic button 'Smooth cuts'. Our algorithm will blend the seams automatically to make the pattern 100% continuous! If necessary, your partner print shop professional can also help by adjusting the repetition scale to perfectly fit paper rolls or bags.

items.q: How to access my link again?
items.a: The access link to your Brand Box was sent to your registered email right after payment confirmation. You can also save it in your browser bookmarks.

items.q: Can I change the project name?
items.a: Yes! To prevent system abuse, we allow 1 brand name change in the 'Logo' tab (completing a total of 2 valid names: the original and the correction).

items.q: Does my link expire?
items.a: No! Your project and all your downloads are available for access whenever you need them, with no expiration date.

items.q: Can I access it from my phone?
items.a: Yes! The Brand Box is fully responsive. You can view your identity, download the logos directly to your camera roll, and review your brand guide from your smartphone.

items.q: How to find the best style for my brand?
items.a: The ideal style is the one that connects the essence of your business to your customer's heart. Our intelligent algorithm crossed your survey answers to find the perfect match among the 6 premium aesthetic directions.

items.q: What is the brand manifesto?
items.a: It's the conceptual voice of your brand written in poetic and inspirational prose. It serves to align your purpose and touch your customer in your official communication.

items.q: How to define my tone of voice?
items.a: The tone of voice ('Tone of Voice' tab) defines the writing guidelines: the words to use, what to avoid, and your brand's attitude when talking to the audience on a daily basis.

quiz_perguntas_geral.pergunta: How would you describe the origin of your brand?
opcoes: It was born from a personal dream and passion
From a need I felt myself
I wanted to change something in my market
It evolved naturally from my life
Women seeking care and welcoming
People who value quality and exclusivity
Those who want to feel special every day
Women in transformation and self-discovery

quiz_perguntas_geral.pergunta: What do you deliver besides the product/service?
opcoes: An experience of lightness and beauty
Confidence and security
Connection and belonging
Transformation and empowerment

quiz_perguntas_geral.pergunta: If your brand were a sensation, it would be…
opcoes: That warm hug
The lightness of a sunny morning
The elegance of something handmade with love
The emotion of a discovery
The care in every detail
The authenticity and real story behind it
The combination of aesthetics and purpose
The human and personalized touch

quiz_perguntas_saude.pergunta: What led you to choose this area of healthcare?
opcoes: A calling that always existed within me
The desire to make a difference in people's lives
A personal experience that transformed me
The desire to unite science and welcoming care
Children and their families
Women in different phases of life
Adults in general
People seeking mental and emotional balance

quiz_perguntas_saude.pergunta: How do you want your patients to feel when they seek you?
opcoes: Welcomed and safe from the first contact
Confident that they are in good hands
Heard and respected in every detail
At peace — as if they finally found the right person

quiz_perguntas_saude.pergunta: What do you deliver beyond technical care?
opcoes: Humanization and true listening
Clarity and confidence for the patient and family
A safe space to speak openly
Care that goes beyond the appointment

quiz_perguntas_saude.pergunta: If your clinic were a sensation, it would be…
opcoes: That motherly hug that calms everything
The lightness of leaving with answers and peace of mind
The security of being in competent and gentle hands
The clarity of finally understanding what is happening
The human gaze and true presence
The combination of technical rigor and gentle care
The way I explain and involve the family in the process
The bond I build with each patient over time

tomdevoz_perguntas.pergunta: How do you write for your audience?
opcoes: In a close and informal way, like a friend
With lightness but care — neither formal nor too intimate
In a professional and clear way
With inspiration — texts that touch and move

tomdevoz_perguntas.pergunta: How do you address your client in messages?
opcoes: You (close and direct)
You + first name sometimes
Dear [Name] (more formal)
Friend, love, darling (very intimate)

tomdevoz_perguntas.pergunta: What kind of communication would you NEVER do?
opcoes: Cold and corporate language
Long and difficult to read text
Something exaggerated or appealing
Technical content without humanization

tomdevoz_perguntas.pergunta: What is the rhythm of your messages?
opcoes: Short, direct, and objective
Narrative — I like to tell stories
Poetic and full of metaphors
Informative and educational

insta_pack.sabiaque_subtitle: A fact that will surprise you

guia_amamentacao_folder.alimentacao_texto_1: A balanced diet, rich in proteins, fibers, and vitamins is recommended. Eat several times a day in small portions to maintain energy.
guia_amamentacao_folder.agua_texto: consume at least two liters a day. Keep glasses of water in the rooms where you breastfeed the most.
guia_amamentacao_folder.fissuras_causa: Poor baby latch or incorrect technique.
guia_amamentacao_folder.fissuras_tratamento: Correct the technique, apply breast milk after feeding.
guia_amamentacao_folder.ingurgitamento_alivio: Express manually, massage the breast gently.
guia_amamentacao_folder.apoio_item_2: The mother needs support in her decision.
guia_amamentacao_folder.muito_mais_que_nutrir_1: Breastfeeding is much more than nourishing.
guia_amamentacao_folder.muito_mais_que_nutrir_2: It is interaction, immunity, and emotional development for the baby.
guia_amamentacao_folder.oms_recomenda: The WHO recommends exclusive breastfeeding for the first six months of life.
guia_amamentacao_folder.para_bebe_desc: Better digestion, immunity, and reduction of allergies.
guia_amamentacao_folder.para_mamae_desc: Helps in weight loss and uterine health.
guia_amamentacao_folder.para_familia_desc: Strengthens bonds and is practical in everyday life.
guia_amamentacao_folder.pega_inadequada: An inadequate latch can lead to sore nipples and poor weight gain for the baby.
guia_amamentacao_folder.certo_desc: Mouth wide open, lips turned outwards, chin touching the breast.
guia_amamentacao_folder.errado_desc: Mouth not wide enough, sunken cheeks, pain.
guia_amamentacao_folder.ordenha_1: Wash your hands and forearms well.
guia_amamentacao_folder.ordenha_3: Thumb above the areola, fingers below.
guia_amamentacao_folder.dica_armazenar: Tip: Always use a sterilized glass jar with a plastic lid to store.
guia_amamentacao_folder.aquecer_desc: Bain-marie (heat turned off). Never use the microwave, so as not to lose the properties.
guia_amamentacao_folder.frase_final: "Breast milk is the best food for your baby."

postmatch.step_128_approval: I approve the generated model and understand that the next steps depend on the chosen plan.

Jardim Encantado: The playful and affectionate look of childhood
Escandinavo Acolhedor: The beauty of simplicity in welcoming
Gentle care that transforms and welcomes
Essência Atemporal: The subtle art of revealing your best version
Doce Encantamento: Made to enchant and welcome the soul
Raízes & Cuidado: Essence of the earth, respect for time
Estético Editorial: The aesthetic of excellence and authority

postmatch.step_115_placeholder: Ex: Care that transforms lives · Design with Purpose · Conscious Beauty
postmatch.creative_refine_loading_question: Talking to the AI Creative Director...
postmatch.creative_refine_alt_note: This recommendation is consultative only and will not be applied automatically.
postmatch.creative_refine_unavailable: Unable to analyze right now. Your current direction remains saved.

checkout.header_pretitle: Creative clarity, even for those who have never created a brand before.
checkout.header_title:
Choose the ideal experience for your brand.
From essential to extraordinary.
checkout.header_subtitle: Your visual identity is ready to stop being an idea and start existing for real.
checkout.plan_essence_highlight: ✨ The essentials to start your brand
checkout.plan_essence_warning: ⚠️ Notice: This plan focuses on modern typographic design and geometric/abstract system patterns. It does not include exclusive custom illustrations, hand-drawn logos, or illustrated footer patterns.
checkout.plan_studio_highlight: ✨ Your brand ready for the world
checkout.plan_studio_warning: ⚠️ Notice: This plan focuses on digital layouts and modern stationery structuring. It does not include custom footer illustrations or hand-drawn logos (these exclusive art options can be requested post-checkout or by contracting the Signature plan).
checkout.plan_sig_badge: ✨ An exclusive experience created together with a designer
plan_sig_features: Exclusive unifying drawings and illustrations (e.g. footer details for prints)
Exclusive applications tailored to your field
checkout.plan_sig_msg: Hello! I want to know more about the Brand Box Signature for the brand {marca}
checkout.footer_msg:
You don't need to know where to start.
I will guide you through each step.
checkout.modal_bonus_subtitle: Choose your 5 free prints. Additional items are $6 each!
checkout.modal_bonus_premium_info: Exclusive add-on: +$ 36.00. Ideal for complete baby tracking. Does not consume the 5 free bonuses!

sucesso.error_not_found_title: Oops! We couldn't find your brand
sucesso.error_not_found_desc_1: We couldn't locate your visual identity data. This can happen if the link has expired or if there was an error during checkout.
sucesso.error_not_found_desc_2: Tip: Check your email, look for the confirmation message from The Brand Box, and try accessing the exclusive link again.
sucesso.welcome_title_returning: your Brand Box is waiting for you!
sucesso.welcome_desc_returning_1: Your brand is still here, ready to evolve with you.
sucesso.welcome_desc_returning_2: Continue exploring combinations, adjusting details, and building a brand that is increasingly yours.
sucesso.welcome_desc_new_1: This is the first step of your Brand Box.
sucesso.welcome_desc_new_2: From now on, we will guide you through a creative experience built to transform ideas, references, and essence into a complete visual identity.
sucesso.welcome_desc_new_3: You make the choices. We organize the path.
sucesso.instructions_item1_desc: For a better visual experience and ease when downloading arts and files in high quality.
sucesso.instructions_item2_desc: Advancing step by step helps build your visual identity smoothly and naturally.
sucesso.instructions_item3_desc: Answer the questions with care and presence while experiencing the creation of your brand.
sucesso.instructions_item4_desc: When in doubt, our Help tab has all the tips and inspirations to support you in the process.
sucesso.instructions_closing: "We wish you an excellent experience with The Brand Box!" 🤍
sucesso.no_variation_saved_hint: No variation saved yet. Try saving the current style!
